hero_subtitle: SFTY standardizes case workflows for VASPs by supporting review routing, decision logging, evidence preservation and audit-ready reporting in one operating layer.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Case workflows remain inconsistent and manual
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with fragmented case management that slows review cycles and creates gaps in audit evidence. Without standardized workflows, operational risks increase and maintaining clear traceability between provider outputs, decisions and regulatory requirements becomes difficult.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider checks, rule-based routing, review actions and evidence preservation into one structured case workflow that accelerates review cycles and strengthens audit trail clarity.
workflow_description: SFTY organizes alerts, provider results and reviews into structured cases that are tracked, escalated, decided and closed with preserved evidence and audit trails.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. Standardized case control
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides digital asset compliance teams a unified layer that turns fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, evidentiary cases and audit-ready records.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASPs with a controlled compliance layer to unify provider outputs, preserve audit evidence, support bank due diligence and enable secure enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a connected operational layer that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, case management, risk-based routing and audit-ready reports.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY standardize case workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports routing, case creation, decision logging and escalation, enabling consistent compliance workflows from initial review through final closure.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case data, decision logs, evidence packages and related compliance actions in structured audit trails for inspections and internal reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one compliance workflow layer without replacing existing systems or disrupting established provider relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers, turning their outputs into structured cases, decisions and reports while enabling teams to maintain current compliance tools and vendor setups.
final_title: Standardize compliance case workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY structures case creation, review routing, decision logs and audit-ready evidence for VASP compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
